title: Meeting room booking
description: Build a customizable meeting room booking system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate room management, capacity and equipment info, a booking timeline, meeting statuses, today's agenda, and a room calendar — not just a prototype, but a customizable, reliable, continuously evolvable meeting room booking system.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的会议室预订系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成会议室管理、容量与设备信息、预订时间轴、会议状态、当天日程和会议室日历，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的会议室预订系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Meeting Room Booking: a gantt-style room-availability board and a calendar scoped to the current user. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/10-meeting-room-booking.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 会议室预订:甘特式会议室占用看板和按当前用户过滤的日历。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/10-meeting-room-booking.html
